title: Submit V18.2: 608-dim Reversible V8 Engine
author: mini-sarami

data.description: Mirrored network structure where the first and second halves share identical weights to reduce physical parameter footprint while preserving logical depth.
Hashes bigrams into token embeddings to accelerate early-stage context comprehension.
Squared LeakyReLU-style activation used to increase expressiveness while remaining computationally lightweight.
Blends current and previous step inputs to smooth gradient propagation and improve optimization.

novel_contributions: Cross-layer weight tying to halve the physical parameter footprint
Expanded hidden dimension to 608 enabled by weight tying
Bigram hash embedding for faster early context modeling
Cross-step attention for smoother gradient propagation
Squared LeakyReLU activation for lightweight expressiveness
Entropy-aware sizing strategy to stay under the 16MB compressed limit
